ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the station (active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station where the data was collected */,
  "folder_name" TEXT /* Folder name where the dataset is stored */,
  "clip_name" TEXT /* Name of the clip (e.g., clip_0_0000) */,
  "image_number" INTEGER /* Image number associated with the dataset */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was collected */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature reading */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity reading */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation reading */,
  "dew_point" REAL /* Dew point reading */,
  "wind_direction" REAL /* Wind direction reading */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed reading */,
  "sun_radiation_intensity" REAL /* Sun radiation intensity reading */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data type */,
  "data_format_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data format */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "data_quality" REAL /* Quality score of the dataset */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., satellite, ground sensor) */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data (e.g., automatic, manual) */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata in JSON format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_data_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_format_id") REFERENCES data_formats ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the data format */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data format */,
  "file_extension" TEXT /* File extension for the data format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the readme file */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for the file to ensure data integrity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the data file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the data file */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for the file to ensure data integrity */,
  "compression_type" TEXT /* Type of compression used (e.g., gzip, zip) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mse_values" (
  "mse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each MSE value */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the MSE value belongs to */,
  "mse_value" REAL /* Mean Squared Error value */,
  "mse_moving_bkgrnd" REAL /* Mean Squared Error value for moving background */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the MSE value was calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mse_values_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sun_radiation_data" (
  "sun_radiation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sun radiation data point */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the sun radiation data belongs to */,
  "sun_radiation_intensity" REAL /* Sun radiation intensity */,
  "min_of_sunshine_latest_10_min" INTEGER /* Minimum of sunshine latest 10 minutes */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sun radiation data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sun_radiation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sun_radiation_data_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
